meanings.definition: walk as if unable to control one's movements
examples: The drunken man staggered into the room
He staggered along in the heavy snow

meanings.definition: to arrange in a systematic order
examples: stagger the chairs in the lecture hall

meanings.definition: astound or overwhelm, as with shock
examples: She was staggered with bills after she tried to rebuild her house following the earthquake

meanings.definition: so surprisingly impressive as to stun or overwhelm
examples: such an enormous response was astonishing
the amount of money required was staggering
the figure inside the boucle dress was stupefying
